title: Faithful 32x for AppleSkin
description: Adds Stylized AppleSkin texture for Faithful 32x | Works on all Game Versions!
body:
# Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NEqlvqKt/images/8b78a109ad22f1ec65d3ed758b5a4ca4a5a841f0.png)

This ResourcePack modifies the AppleSkin texture making it more suitable for Faithful 32x

(Everything is visible above)

# Load Order
![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NEqlvqKt/images/56616a421a6fb4224a8fdf51fa47ddf27200d915.png)

This is not Necessary, but it is Desirable.
